university_overview.about: Sanjay Ghodawat University (SGU) is a premier educational institution located in Kolhapur, Maharashtra. Spread across a lush 165-acre campus, we focus on industry-aligned education.
university_overview.accreditations: We are AICTE Approved, NAAC A Grade, and NBA Accredited.
university_overview.working_hours: The admission office is open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.

admissions.eligibility: For Undergraduate programs like B.Tech and BCA, students must score above 70% in their 12th board exams in relevant subjects.
admissions.entrance_exams: For B.Tech, valid scores in JEE Main or MHT-CET are mandatory. For MBA, exams like MAH-MBA-CET, CAT, or MAT are required.
admissions.process: The admission process is straightforward: 1. Fill out the online application. 2. Submit entrance exam scores. 3. Attend counseling or an interview if shortlisted. 4. Pay the admission confirmation fee.
admissions.documents: Parents will need to bring the student's 10th and 12th mark sheets, Entrance Exam Scorecard, Transfer Certificate, Aadhar Card, and passport-size photos.

btech_software.courses: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (AIML) and Computer Science Engineering (CSE).
btech_software.syllabus_highlights: The curriculum focuses heavily on Python, Neural Networks, Cloud Computing, Data Structures, and Software Development.
btech_software.facilities: Students have access to high-end computing labs with the latest GPUs for AI training.

btech_core.courses: B.Tech in Civil, Mechanical, and Aeronautical Engineering.
btech_core.syllabus_highlights: Focuses on CAD/CAM, Thermodynamics, Structural Engineering, and Aerodynamics.
btech_core.facilities: Features massive mechanical workshops, wind tunnel testing for Aero, and heavy machinery labs.

computer_applications.fees: 1 Lakh per year for both programs.
computer_applications.details: Perfect for students wanting to jump directly into software engineering, web development, and IT management without a core engineering degree.

management.fees: 1 Lakh per year for both programs.
management.details: Specializations are available in Finance, Marketing, HR, and Business Analytics. We focus heavily on case studies and corporate internships.

other_programs.courses: Law (BA LLB / BBA LLB), Mass Communication, and Architecture.
other_programs.details: These programs feature moot courts for Law, design studios for Architecture, and media labs for Mass Comm.

campus_life.hostel: We provide highly secure, separate hostels for boys and girls. The fee is 60,000 INR per year. Rooms come with Wi-Fi, study desks, and 24/7 warden security.
campus_life.mess_and_food: The mess fee is 4,000 INR per month, serving nutritious and hygienic meals. The campus also features a large food court and multiple cafes for students to hang out.
campus_life.convenience: Students don't need to leave campus for basics. We have an on-campus laundry service, a local mart for daily needs, and ATMs.
campus_life.sports: We boast world-class sporting facilities including a full-sized cricket stadium, a football stadium, basketball courts, and an indoor gym.

career_and_placements.stats: SGU has a phenomenal placement record. The average package is between 4 to 5 LPA, with our highest package hitting 15 LPA.
career_and_placements.top_recruiters: Our top recruiters include global giants like Bentley, Tata Motors, Emicon, TCS, and Infosys.
career_and_placements.training: The placement cell provides rigorous training in soft skills, aptitude tests, and mock interviews from the 3rd year onwards.

transportation.details: We have a massive fleet of safe, comfortable college buses that provide daily pickup and drop-off services for students traveling from Sangli, Ichalkaranji, and all across Kolhapur.
